sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Nong kamciamna thu ka za khin,
Ka gilkialna uh sawtzo hi, tua na thupha ka ngak uh hi,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Topa, Pentecost thupha ko hong puak in,
Guahpi, huihpi nung bangin, Kha Siangtho hong buaksuk in,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nong hehpih thupha kamciamna, Vil a ka ngak laitak
Topa, Pentecost thupha ko hong puak in;
A sang van mun siangtho panin, mawhna baang lungsim
Topa, Pentecost thupha ko hong puak in.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Topa, Pentecost thupha ko hong puak in;
khempeuh in, gupna a ngahkim mateng in,
Topa, Pentecost thupha ko hong puak in;
